name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Fixed the Work Shifts/Off Day page — it was crashing when opened.
Safety net: if something ever breaks, you'll now see a plain "Something went wrong" message with a Reload button instead of a blank screen.
Work Shifts / Off Day: the shift roster is now drag-and-drop — pick a team member's card and drop it onto Morning, Noon or Night (tap the card instead on phones). No more typing names.
Added a Noon shift alongside Morning and Night.
New "Off-day counts" section shows how many days off each team member has taken this month and this year.
Only masters and managers can rearrange the shift roster now; staff can still view it and plan a day off.
